entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The agricultural crop studied, specifically the cultivar Robut 33-1, to evaluate its response to water stress

entities.name: WATER DEFICIT
entities.description: The condition of limited soil water availability applied at three different levels during the preflowering phase

entities.name: PREFLOWERING PHASE
entities.description: The specific growth stage of the groundnut plant before the onset of flowering

entities.name: ALFISOL
entities.description: The medium deep soil type in which the groundnut study was conducted

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, the location where the research was performed

entities.name: CENTRAL INDIA
entities.description: The geographic region where the ICRISAT research site is located

entities.name: CROP GROWTH
entities.description: The overall vegetative development of the groundnut plant following the preflowering phase

entities.name: POD GROWTH RATE
entities.description: The speed at which the pods of the groundnut plant develop

entities.name: FLOWERING
entities.description: The biological process of flower production in the groundnut plant

entities.name: TOTAL POD NUMBER
entities.description: The cumulative number of pods produced by the groundnut plant

entities.name: POD SETTING
entities.description: The process by which flowers are successfully converted into pods

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The stage at which the groundnut pods reach full development

entities.name: POD SET SYNCHRONY
entities.description: The degree to which pod setting occurs simultaneously across the plant

entities.name: MATURE PODS
entities.description: The proportion of pods that reach full maturity by the time of final harvest

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The final amount of agricultural produce harvested from the groundnut plots
